lumi.hover_lumi_for_tagline: Hover or tap Lumi to reveal the Vietnamese tagline
lumi.lumi-tagline-hover: Lumi — vì ánh sáng biến nguyện ước thành sự thật

validation.agency_required: Agency name must be at least 2 characters.
validation.agency_too_long: Agency name must be 100 characters or fewer.
validation.brief_required: Brief must be at least 10 characters.
validation.brief_too_long: Brief must be 600 characters or fewer.
validation.capacity_required: Monthly capacity must be at least 1.
validation.capacity_too_high: Monthly capacity must be 50 or fewer.
validation.country_code: Use a two-letter country code, such as VN or US.
validation.name_required: Name must be at least 2 characters.
validation.name_too_long: Name must be 80 characters or fewer.
validation.url_too_long: URL must be 160 characters or fewer.
